form.formComment: Last start failed to finish when she ran at Wagin on April 2 over 2590m. Two runs back 2nd (Fr3) over 1730m at this track beaten 5 m by Dat Lovely (2:05.90) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on March 24 at $19. Prefer to see her perform well before recommending.

form.formComment: Backs up three days after she failed to impress was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr3) over 1730m at this track, beaten 14 m by Vinnies Star (2:08.60) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on April 7 at $17. Before that was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr5) over 1177m at Pinjarra beaten 12 m by Akabah (1:23.10) in NR up to 55 on March 30 at $8.50. Not keen on her chances in this line-up.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr3) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 4.5 m by Salsawithsierra (2:05.50) in 4yo+ NR 49 to 55 on March 31 at $26.
